# Projects

## Storefront web app #projects #storefront #frontend

The storefront is the customer-facing web application. Active repository: the
storefront monorepo. Lanes here touch UI, checkout flow, and accessibility.

## Billing service #projects #billing #backend

The billing service handles invoices and subscription state. Active repository:
the billing backend. Lanes here touch the invoice API and webhook handlers.

## Data platform #projects #data #platform

The data platform runs ingestion and reporting jobs. Active repository: the
platform pipelines. Lanes here touch schedulers and transform steps.
